name: 16p11_2_proximal_autism
description: 16p11.2 proximal recurrent microdeletion/duplication region (~600 kb, BP4-BP5), flanked by directly oriented SD blocks. One of the most penetrant CNV loci for autism and developmental delay; the duplication confers schizophrenia risk.

architecture.internal_structure: BP4 and BP5 SD blocks of ~150 kb at >99% identity (BOLA2/SLX1/SULT1A4 duplicons); unique core contains TBX6, MAZ, KIF22, MVP, CDIPT, PRRT2, MAPK3, DOC2A.
